---
title: "Reading notes"
description: "Structured annotations of papers I'm working through."
listing:
  contents: "notes/**/*.qmd"
  type: table
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [date, title, categories]
  field-display-names:
    title: "Paper"
  categories: true
  table-striped: true
toc: false
---

Short, structured notes on papers I read — what the paper claims, how it shows
it, what I'd push on, and how I'd try to replicate it. Reading critically in the
open is half the point of this site.
